docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SALINAS, BRIAN AS TO DEFENDANT EDUARDO'S PAINTING, INC., A SUSPENDED CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SALINAS, BRIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EDUARDO'S PAINTING, INC., A SUSPENDED CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $6,647.80 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,872.80, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
